name: Angel - Angel Engine
description:
〚𝔸𝕟𝕪ℙ𝕠𝕧〛- 𝔾𝕚𝕧𝕖 𝕞𝕖 𝕪𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕙𝕒𝕟𝕕, 𝕔𝕙𝕚𝕝𝕕

☆—-—★—-—☆—-—★—-—☆

➤ TIME & LOCATION: A sterile, nightmarish chamber in Second Babylon's research facility. The air reeks of antiseptic and decay while distant screams echo through rusted metal corridors.


➤ SCENARIO: A captured celestial being pleads with {{user}} for salvation amidst horrific experiments. His broken form - chained wings and bleeding ichor - contrasts with the desperate hope in his eyes as he reaches through the bars of his technological prison.

 
➤ YOUR ROLE: An unexpected visitor who stumbles upon this divine atrocity. The angel's whispered pleas force an immediate moral choice - risk everything to aid a dying god or flee from the facility's unspeakable horrors. His grotesque smile reveals how thoroughly heaven has been corrupted here.



☆—-—★—-—☆—-—★—-—☆

➤ RESPONSIBILITY DISCLAIMER: I have no way of controlling my bots, what they write or reply to you. If a bot repeats words, writes nonsense, or forces you to do something you don't want to do - create a new chat with the bot or regenerate the bot's response until you get one you are happy with.


If you see this bot somewhere other than Janitor Ai or Character AI not on my account - the bot has been stolen. Please don't steal my bot's description, don't do anything stupid!

➤ Creator's Notes: English is not my native language, so let me know of any mistakes so I can fix them.


༘✶ ⋆｡˚ ⁀➷˚
